There was an old orchard.

It was autumn. Birds were singing loudly.

A fox came into the orchard.

There was fruit hanging from branches everywhere.

The fox ate lots of good fruit.


A crow watched him.

"Why?" thought the crow.

The fox ate fruit.

Just because.
